versionGroups.label: Mobile React + @types/react versions are set by Expo SDK 55 (exact-pin React 19.2.0, ~19.2.x types) — web tracks its own React 19.2.x patch via Next's recommended pin. Both are 19.2.x; the patch drift is intentional.
Mobile pins Tailwind 3 (NativeWind 4 requires 3.4+; NativeWind hasn't moved to Tailwind 4 yet)
tailwind-config peer accepts both Tailwind 3 (mobile/NativeWind) and Tailwind 4 (web)
ui-web declares React 19 as a peer range; the web app pins to an exact 19.x — both satisfy each other
